headline: Netflix Reigns Supreme With Unmatched Viewership, Global Reach, And Robust Fundamentals
summary: Netflix's Q1 2026 revenue grew 16.2% YoY to $12.25B, maintaining double-digit growth despite macro headwinds and intense competition. See more on NFLX stock here.

headline: Netflix Pitches ‘Buyback-and-Chill’ Strategy
summary: A first-quarter earnings beat last week was overshadowed by weak second-quarter guidance that suggested growing subscriber churn.
